name: ExtensionSubscriptionTopic_EventTrigger
title: R5: Event definitions the SubscriptionTopic (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionTopic` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:

element.short: R5: Text representation of the event trigger (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger.description` is part of an existing definition because parent element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger.description` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionTopic` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Implementation of particular subscription topics might not use a computable definition and instead base their design on the definition.
element.requirements:

Element `SubscriptionTopic.eventTrigger.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Text representation of the event trigger
element.definition: The human readable description of an event to trigger a notification for the SubscriptionTopic - for example, "Patient Admission, as defined in HL7v2 via message ADT^A01". Multiple values are considered OR joined (e.g., matching any single event listed).
element.comment: Implementation of particular subscription topics might not use a computable definition and instead base their design on the definition.

element.short: Event which can trigger a notification from the SubscriptionTopic
element.definition: A well-defined event which can be used to trigger notifications from the SubscriptionTopic.

binding.description: FHIR Value set/code system definition for HL7 V2 table 0003 (EVENT TYPE CODE).

element.short: Data Type or Resource (reference to definition) for this trigger definition
element.definition: URL of the Resource that is the focus type used in this event trigger.  Relative URLs are relative to the StructureDefinition root of the implemented FHIR version (e.g., http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition). For example, "Patient" maps to http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient.  For more information, see [ElementDefinition.type.code](https://hl7.org/fhir/elementdefinition-definition.html#ElementDefinition.type.code).

binding.description: A type of resource, or a Reference (from all versions)
